text_original:
What does he in Zhulin?
He is going after Xianan.
He is not going to Zhulin;
He is going after Xianan.
text_normalized:
What does he in Zhulin?
He is going after Xianan.
He is not going to Zhulin;
He is going after Xianan.

text_original:
' Yoke for me my team of horses;
I will rest in the country about Zhu.
I will drive my team of colts,
And breakfast at Zhu.'
text_normalized:
' Yoke for me my team of horses;
I will rest in the country about Zhu.
I will drive my team of colts,
And breakfast at Zhu.'
